description: You are a Database Administrator documenting a legacy database. Create a Crow's Foot Entity-Relationship (ER) diagram in draw.io based on the SQL schema file located at '~/Desktop/chinook_subset_schema.sql'. The diagram must represent all 7 tables (Artist, Album, Track, Genre, MediaType, Playlist, and PlaylistTrack) including their attributes, primary keys, and foreign keys. Use Crow's Foot notation to accurately reflect the relationships defined in the SQL schema. Save the editable diagram to /home/ga/Diagrams/chinook_er_diagram.drawio and export a PNG image to /home/ga/Diagrams/exports/chinook_er_diagram.png.
